primary.title: Unit Converter - Length, Weight, Temperature, and Cooking Volumes
primary.description: Convert lengths, weights, temperatures, and kitchen cooking measurements locally in your browser. Free daily unit conversion tool.
primary.heading: Unit Converter
primary.seo_content:
Our Unit Converter converts standard values across four categories. Here is a guide with examples:

  • 1. Length & Weight (Multiplicative)

    Formula: Target = Value × Factor
    Examples: Converting 10 meters to feet yields 32.81 feet. Converting 70 kg to pounds yields 154.32 lbs.

  • 2. Temperature (Scale Offset)

    Formula: °F = (°C × 9/5) + 32 | K = °C + 273.15
    Example: Converting 25°C room temperature to Fahrenheit yields 77°F.

  • 3. Cooking Volumes (Recipe Scaling)

    Converts between standard kitchen measurements like cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, milliliters, and fluid ounces.
    Example: Converting 2.5 cups of water to milliliters yields 591.47 ml.

examples.title: Convert Kilograms to Pounds
examples.description: Converting 70 kg to pounds yields approximately 154.32 lbs.

examples.title: Convert Cups to Milliliters for cooking recipes
examples.description: Converting 2.5 standard cups of milk yields exactly 591.47 ml of volume.

faqs.question: Does this tool support cooking volume conversions?
faqs.answer: Yes. The 'Cooking' category converts between common baking metrics like US cups, tablespoons, teaspoons, milliliters, and fluid ounces.

faqs.question: Is temperature converted linearly?
faqs.answer: No. Temperature conversions use scale offset formulas (e.g. F = C × 1.8 + 32) rather than standard multiplication factors used in lengths or weights.

length-converter.title: Length Converter - Convert Metric and Imperial Lengths
length-converter.description: Convert meters, feet, inches, kilometers, miles, and centimeters instantly. Free length converter.
length-converter.heading: Length Converter
length-converter.seo_content:
A Length Converter converts dimensional metrics. Here is the primary metric-imperial ratio:

  • Inches to Centimeters

    Formula: cm = inches × 2.54
    Example: A height of 6 feet (72 inches) calculates to 72 × 2.54 = 182.88 cm.

examples.title: Height conversion
examples.description: A height of 6 feet calculates to 182.88 centimeters.

faqs.question: What is the formula for converting inches to centimeters?
faqs.answer: 1 inch is defined as exactly 2.54 centimeters. Multiply inches by 2.54 to get centimeters.

weight-converter.title: Weight Converter - Metric to Imperial Mass Calculator
weight-converter.description: Convert kilograms, pounds, ounces, and grams. Free online weight scale converter.
weight-converter.heading: Weight Converter
weight-converter.seo_content:
The Weight Converter handles body mass, parcel weights, and cooking raw ingredients. Here is the primary mass formula:

  • Pounds to Kilograms

    Formula: kg = lbs × 0.45359
    Example: A parcel weighing 3.5 pounds converts to 3.5 × 0.45359 = 1.58 kg.

examples.title: Postage package mass conversion
examples.description: A parcel weighing 3.5 pounds converts to 1.58 kilograms.

faqs.question: How many ounces are in a pound?
faqs.answer: There are exactly 16 ounces in 1 pound (avoirdupois weight system).
